name: settings-manager
description: Visual manager for Claude Code settings + permissions across all scopes (Trio_Specs §B). Centerpiece: the effective-permission simulator -- load managed/local/project/user scopes, show the merged result, and answer 'would this tool call be allowed right now, and which rule in which file decides?'. Full editor guarded by non-negotiable rails: atomic writes, timestamped backups under ~/.suite/settings-backups/, validation before any write, mandatory diff preview -- no silent writes, ever. Curated template packs apply through the same rails. Mounted into `ship serve` as the Deck's Settings tab; also ships a standalone `settings-manager` bin.
